title: podman machine not able to restart after exit 255
body:
### Issue Description

podman stable (4.5.1) and podman current main branch on macOS

When I'm facing the error https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/17403 with exit 255, then podman machine is in invalid state, meaning that there is a qemu process still running

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman machine start (fails with exit 255)
2. check you have a qemu process still running
3. podman machine ls says the machine is not running
4. there is a qemu process still running (px aux)
5. starting with `podman machine start` fails as there is still a living qemu process
6. podman machine stop is not stopping the qemu process so we need to manually kill the qemu process


![image](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/436777/5f870317-276b-46fa-9bc1-1d8b649abcfe)


```shell
$ podman machine start                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Mounting volume... /Users:/Users
Error: exit status 255

$ podman machine ls                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                NAME                    VM TYPE     CREATED       LAST UP             CPUS        MEMORY      DISK SIZE
tmp*                    qemu        39 hours ago  About a minute ago  1           2.147GB     107.4GB
podman-machine-default  qemu        7 weeks ago   25 hours ago        1           2.147GB     107.4GB
my-machine              qemu        2 weeks ago   40 hours ago        1           2.147GB     107.4GB
foo                     qemu        3 weeks ago   42 hours ago        1           2.147GB     107.4GB
maxmem                  qemu        2 weeks ago   13 days ago         2           4.295GB     107.4GB

$ ps aux | grep qemu                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          benoitf          49884   1.0  1.4 411913152 1411872 s009  S     9:31AM   0:06.27 /opt/homebrew/bin/qemu-system-aarch64 -m 2048 -smp 1 -fw_cfg name=opt/com.coreos/config,file=/Users/benoitf/.config/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default.ign -qmp unix:/var/folders/_s/rlbw3qg15vx0j6vr4l7kd1hm0000gn/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock,server=on,wait=off -netdev socket,id=vlan,fd=3 -device virtio-net-pci,netdev=vlan,mac=5a:94:ef:e4:0c:ee -device virtio-serial -chardev socket,path=/var/folders/_s/rlbw3qg15vx0j6vr4l7kd1hm0000gn/T/podman/podman-machine-default_ready.sock,server=on,wait=off,id=apodman-machine-default_ready -device virtserialport,chardev=apodman-machine-default_ready,name=org.fedoraproject.port.0 -pidfile /var/folders/_s/rlbw3qg15vx0j6vr4l7kd1hm0000gn/T/podman/podman-machine-default_vm.pid -accel hvf -accel tcg -cpu host -M virt,highmem=on -drive file=/opt/homebrew/share/qemu/edk2-aarch64-code.fd,if=pflash,format=raw,readonly=on -drive file=/Users/benoitf/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_ovmf_vars.fd,if=pflash,format=raw -virtfs local,path=/Users,mount_tag=vol0,security_model=none -virtfs local,path=/private,mount_tag=vol1,security_model=none -virtfs local,path=/var/folders,mount_tag=vol2,security_model=none -drive if=virtio,file=/Users/benoitf/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_fedora-coreos-38.20230414.2.1-qemu.aarch64.qcow2 -display none
benoitf          49930   0.0  0.0 408626944   1360 s009  S+    9:32AM   0:00.00 grep --color=auto --exclude-dir=.bzr --exclude-dir=CVS --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.hg --exclude-dir=.svn --exclude-dir=.idea --exclude-dir=.tox qemu

$ podman machine start                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
```

### Describe the results you received

if podman machine fails to start, there should not be any ongoing qemu process (should be stopped/killed)

podman machine stop command should also kill that qemu process if there is one


### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@vrothberg was this something you covered in your fixes?

> @vrothberg was this something you covered in your fixes?

I fixed the `exit 255` part but the other part of the machine being in faulty state remains.
Closing this issue as https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19469 will fix it.
